scripts.postinstall: node -e "const{existsSync}=require('fs');if(!existsSync('packages/types/dist/index.js')||!existsSync('packages/sdk/dist/sdk.js'))process.exit(1)" || (bun run build:types && bun run build:sdk)
scripts.build: bun run build:types && bun run build:sdk && bun run build:plugins
scripts.build:plugins: bun run build:drivers && bun run build:middlewares && bun run build:triggers && bun run build:completions
scripts.build:drivers: bun run --filter @tagma/driver-codex build && bun run --filter @tagma/driver-opencode build
scripts.check: bun run check:types && bun run check:sdk && bun run check:driver-codex && bun run check:driver-opencode && bun run check:middleware-lightrag && bun run check:trigger-webhook && bun run check:completion-llm-judge && bun run check:server && bun run check:client && bun run check:tests
scripts.publish:types: cd packages/types && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:driver-codex: bun run build:types && cd packages/driver-codex && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:driver-opencode: bun run build:types && cd packages/driver-opencode && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:middleware-lightrag: bun run build:types && cd packages/middleware-lightrag && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:trigger-webhook: bun run build:types && cd packages/trigger-webhook && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:completion-llm-judge: bun run build:types && cd packages/completion-llm-judge && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:sdk: bun run build:types && cd packages/sdk && bun run build && bun publish
scripts.publish:all: bun run publish:types && bun run publish:driver-codex && bun run publish:driver-opencode && bun run publish:middleware-lightrag && bun run publish:trigger-webhook && bun run publish:completion-llm-judge && bun run publish:sdk
scripts.publish:dry: bun run build && cd packages/types && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../driver-codex && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../driver-opencode && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../middleware-lightrag && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../trigger-webhook && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../completion-llm-judge && bun publish --dry-run && cd ../sdk && bun publish --dry-run
scripts.version:types:patch: cd packages/types && bun pm version patch
scripts.version:types:minor: cd packages/types && bun pm version minor
scripts.version:types:major: cd packages/types && bun pm version major
scripts.version:codex:patch: cd packages/driver-codex && bun pm version patch
scripts.version:codex:minor: cd packages/driver-codex && bun pm version minor
scripts.version:codex:major: cd packages/driver-codex && bun pm version major
scripts.version:opencode:patch: cd packages/driver-opencode && bun pm version patch
scripts.version:opencode:minor: cd packages/driver-opencode && bun pm version minor
scripts.version:opencode:major: cd packages/driver-opencode && bun pm version major
scripts.version:lightrag:patch: cd packages/middleware-lightrag && bun pm version patch
scripts.version:lightrag:minor: cd packages/middleware-lightrag && bun pm version minor
scripts.version:lightrag:major: cd packages/middleware-lightrag && bun pm version major
scripts.version:webhook:patch: cd packages/trigger-webhook && bun pm version patch
scripts.version:webhook:minor: cd packages/trigger-webhook && bun pm version minor
scripts.version:webhook:major: cd packages/trigger-webhook && bun pm version major
scripts.version:llm-judge:patch: cd packages/completion-llm-judge && bun pm version patch
scripts.version:llm-judge:minor: cd packages/completion-llm-judge && bun pm version minor
scripts.version:llm-judge:major: cd packages/completion-llm-judge && bun pm version major
scripts.version:sdk:patch: cd packages/sdk && bun pm version patch
scripts.version:sdk:minor: cd packages/sdk && bun pm version minor
scripts.version:sdk:major: cd packages/sdk && bun pm version major
